# chikomukwenha.co

> Personal website of Chiko Mukwenha, a product engineer from Zimbabwe writing about making things well in a world that's moving fast.

## About the author

Chiko Mukwenha is a self-taught product engineer with over a decade of experience. Originally from Zimbabwe, he works remotely as a digital nomad. He cares about software craft, boring fundamentals over flashy trends, and building products thoughtfully.

## What this site covers

- Software engineering craft and fundamentals
- Building products independently
- Object-oriented design
- Working with AI as a tool (not a replacement)
- Personal experiments and reflections
- Team building and leadership

## Current work

Building contentboo.st, a content creation tool for creators and marketers.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://chikomukwenha.co/
- Writing archive: https://chikomukwenha.co/writing/
- About: https://chikomukwenha.co/about/
- Now: https://chikomukwenha.co/now/
- RSS feed: https://chikomukwenha.co/rss.xml
